name: memory-ceiling
notes: NFT-16 headless proxy per 01-VISION.md §5. Measures WallStore RSS growth for 10k elements (data-layer memory only, no GPU). Full RSS including Three.js and browser overhead is measured in apps/editor-bench/ (Wave 13 browser harness). Data-layer ceiling is set at 50 MB (10% of the 500 MB NFT-16 total budget).
